goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 14:45' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
The train should leave on 'friday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'italian' food and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '3 people' at '10:15' on 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 14:45 and should depart from cambridge
The train should leave on friday and should go to bishops stortford
Make sure you get travel time and arrival time
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the expensive price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 10:15 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
